files.content:
import { SearchIcon } from "lucide-react";
import {
  InputGroup,
  InputGroupAddon,
  InputGroupInput,
} from "@/registry/default/ui/input-group";

export default function Particle() {
  return (
    <>
      <InputGroup>
        <InputGroupInput
          aria-label="Search"
          placeholder="Search"
          size="sm"
          type="search"
        />
        <InputGroupAddon>
          <SearchIcon aria-hidden="true" />
        </InputGroupAddon>
      </InputGroup>
      <InputGroup>
        <InputGroupInput
          aria-label="Search"
          placeholder="Search"
          size="lg"
          type="search"
        />
        <InputGroupAddon>
          <SearchIcon aria-hidden="true" />
        </InputGroupAddon>
      </InputGroup>
    </>
  );
}
